query: count open work orders by site — note our shop renamed some statuses
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-work-orders with maximo-overview as parent
Recognizes that WORKORDER.STATUS stores the synonym VALUE, not the internal MAXVALUE
Resolves the open-status set via SYNONYMDOMAIN (DOMAINID='WOSTATUS', select VALUE where MAXVALUE in the internal set) rather than hard-coding literals
Filters WOCLASS='WORKORDER' and ISTASK=0, groups by SITEID
